latHint: Think asserting your rightful interest - not placing a bet.
pivHint: A gambler places a STAKE on the table - but you can also plant a STAKE in the ground to mark territory. What word means asserting that right?
winText: Asserting your right. STAKE was the pivot - casino bet to staking a CLAIM.
lossText: CLAIM - to assert a right or interest. STAKE was the pivot: casino bet to staking a CLAIM.
